name: Docusign eSignature REST API
description: The Docusign eSignature REST API provides you with a powerful, convenient, and simple Web services API for interacting with Docusign.

capabilities.name: services
capabilities.description: Manage services — retrieves the available rest api versions. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: resources
capabilities.description: Manage resources — lists resources for rest version specified. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: accounts
capabilities.description: Manage accounts — creates new accounts, updates the account settings for an account, sets the envelope purge configuration for an account. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: invoices
capabilities.description: Manage invoices — get a list of billing invoices, get a list of past due invoices, retrieves a billing invoice. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: payments
capabilities.description: Manage payments — posts a payment to a past due invoice, gets payment information for one or more payments, gets billing payment information for a specific payment. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: billing_plans
capabilities.description: Manage billing plans — updates an account billing plan, queues downgrade billing plan request for an account, reserved: purchase additional envelopes. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: account_brands
capabilities.description: Manage account brands — creates one or more brand profiles for an account, updates an existing brand, updates a brand logo. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: bulk_send
capabilities.description: Manage bulk send — creates a bulk send list, creates a bulk send request, creates a bulk send test. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: chunked_uploads
capabilities.description: Manage chunked uploads — initiate a new chunked upload, commit a chunked upload, add a chunk to an existing chunked upload. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: connect_configurations
capabilities.description: Manage connect configurations — creates a connect configuration, set up connect oauth for the specified account, updates a specified connect configuration. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: connect_events
capabilities.description: Manage connect events — republishes connect information for multiple envelopes, republishes connect information for the specified envelope, gets the connect failure log information. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: envelope_publish
capabilities.description: Manage envelope publish — submits a batch of historical envelopes for republish to a webhook. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
